title: Binary to Decimal Converter - Number Base Conversion
description: Free binary to decimal converter. Convert between binary, decimal, octal, and hexadecimal number systems instantly.
keywords: binary to decimal converter, number base converter, binary calculator, hex converter, octal converter
intro: Convert numbers between binary (base 2), decimal (base 10), octal (base 8), and hexadecimal (base 16) systems.

faq.q: How do I convert binary to decimal?
faq.a: Multiply each binary digit by 2 raised to its position power (starting from 0 on the right), then sum all values. Example: 1010 = 8+0+2+0 = 10.
Binary is the fundamental number system for computers. All digital data is stored and processed as sequences of 0s and 1s.
Hexadecimal (base 16) uses digits 0-9 and letters A-F. It's commonly used in programming for colors, memory addresses, and compact binary representation.
